loop1.title: Transfer readiness
loop1.note: Showing transfer readiness score as a load factor proxy (active_power_total_kw) — a dedicated transfer readiness score column is not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Activity
loop1.note: Showing total active power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; transfer count/duration/count metrics are not directly measured by this UPS meter, so they are honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Source Transfer — Composite
loop1.note: Showing input voltage and current trends — readiness score, bypass voltage, bypass frequency, and transfer counts are not measured by this UPS asset.
